rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies a real (though minor) proof-quality issue: the bare `simp` in `fiberHomeomorph`'s proof term (line 73) relies on the default simp set for `Set.mem_singleton_iff`, making it brittle; replacing with `simp only` or an explicit `Iff.intro` would slightly improve robustness. Review 1 missed this, so acting on Review 2 yields a marginally better PR.
